heading: Perfection of mining claims within forest
label: 482q Perfection of mining claims within forest
text: Valid mining claims within the said lands, existing on , and thereafter maintained in compliance with the law under which they were initiated and the laws of the State of Arizona, may be perfected under sections 482 to 482q of this title, or under the laws under which they were initiated, as the claimant may desire.July 12, 1951o
